items.briefing:
Google has rolled out a new fake call detection feature for Android phones in Australia, which can help identify potential scam or fraud calls in real time — a useful protection given the ongoing rise in phone-based scams targeting Australians. Separately, a known vulnerability in SolarWinds Serv-U file transfer software is now being actively exploited by attackers to crash servers, so any Australian organisation using this product should apply available patches immediately.

**Practical tip:** Check with your IT team whether your organisation uses SolarWinds Serv-U, and if so, ensure it has been updated to the latest version as soon as possible.

featured.title: Google rolls out fake call detection on Android phones
featured.quote: Google's spoofed call detection directly protects Australian Android users from identity fraud and scams.
